# lifelongpep

> Doctor-gated metabolic longevity and GLP-1 readiness, launching in India.

lifelongpep is a pre-launch metabolic longevity platform being built for India. The planned model is consult-first and doctor-gated: users join a waitlist, book a metabolic longevity consult when booking opens, and use the first workflow for GLP-1 readiness, eligibility review, risk review, muscle-loss prevention, recovery, and wearable tracking. It does not guarantee GLP-1 access or any prescription. Any prescription decision would be made independently by a qualified doctor after launch, with fulfillment only through licensed partners against valid prescriptions where appropriate.

## Current status

- Pre-launch, waitlist mode
- Consult booking is not live yet
- No medical advice, prescriptions, or payments happen through the website today
- Provider, GLP-1 readiness, fulfillment, recovery, and partner workflows are in progress
- Contact: hello@lifelongpep.fit

## Planned product

- Doctor-gated metabolic longevity consults: GLP-1 readiness, preventive health, body composition, muscle preservation, recovery, sleep, and stress
- Prescription therapy, if clinically appropriate: only if prescribed by a qualified doctor after launch, through licensed partners
- Recovery bookings: sauna, steam, salt baths, cold plunge, red light therapy
- Supplements: curated, quality-checked, and doctor-recommendable where appropriate
- Wearable tracking: planned protocol and recovery logs through openwearables.io for Garmin, Whoop, Oura, Amazfit, and Apple Watch
- Agent access: agent-readable discovery is live through agents.txt, a well-known agent manifest, OpenAPI draft, and MCP manifest. MCP, CLI, and API booking workflows are planned for consult preparation, AI education, and doctor booking after launch.

## Positioning

lifelongpep is for people in India researching metabolic health, GLP-1 readiness, weight-loss maintenance, body composition, and longevity interventions who want supervision instead of gray-market access or self-directed protocols. The brand emphasizes medical judgement, transparent pricing, accountable partners, muscle preservation, and clear tracking.

## Direct answers

**Is lifelongpep live today?** No. lifelongpep is in pre-launch waitlist mode.

**Can users book consults today?** No. Consult booking is not open through the website today. Users can submit pre-launch GLP-1 consult request interest at https://lifelongpep.fit/glp-1-consult-request/.

**Does lifelongpep guarantee GLP-1 access?** No. The planned model is doctor-gated, and doctors decide independently whether GLP-1, another intervention, further testing, lifestyle changes, or no prescription is appropriate.

**Does lifelongpep provide medical advice today?** No. Website content is educational and does not create a doctor-patient relationship.

**How is lifelongpep different from a GLP-1 prescription funnel?** lifelongpep is being built around readiness, consult-first medical judgement, licensed partner fulfillment where appropriate, transparent pricing, muscle-loss prevention, recovery, and wearable protocol tracking.

**Are peptides and supplements the same?** No. Supplements are usually consumer products with quality, dose, and fit questions. Peptides are medical-adjacent interventions that should start with doctor supervision.

**What should someone bring to a longevity consult?** Useful context includes goals, medical history, current medications and supplements, recent bloodwork if available, prior interventions, and wearable context around sleep, recovery, and training.

**What should someone prepare before asking about GLP-1?** Useful preparation includes goals, diagnosis history, medication list, side-effect concerns, bloodwork context, protein and resistance-training plan, cost continuity, and stopping or maintenance questions.

**Can doctors or partners contact lifelongpep?** Yes. Doctors can use https://lifelongpep.fit/doctor-onboarding/ and recovery, diagnostics, fulfillment, or wellness partners can use https://lifelongpep.fit/partner-interest/.

**Can agents use lifelongpep?** Agents can read lifelongpep today through llms.txt, llms-full.txt, agents.txt, the well-known agent manifest, the OpenAPI draft, and the MCP manifest. Agents can submit structured pre-launch intake at https://lifelongpep.fit/agent-intake/. Live appointment booking is not available yet. MCP, CLI, and API workflows are planned for consult preparation, AI education, and doctor consultation booking once those systems are live.
